title: Tommee Tippee Easiscoop Feeding Bowls with Lid and Easy Scoop Spoon, 6m+, Includes 2 Bowls, Dishwasher and Microwave Safe
features: Baby bowls with a hygienic storage lid: The lid stops spills, holds the spoon, and means no leaks and less mess for you to clean up​
Easy-grip baby weaning spoon: With a chunky, textured handle that’s easy to pick up and comfortable to hold​
Ready to wean: Suitable for weaning babies aged 6 months and up​
Baby-safe: BPA, BPS, PVC and Phthalate, and Nitrosamine free​
Easy to clean, stack, and store: Dishwasher, microwave, steriliser and freezer safe to make cleaning up simpler, and they stack on top of each other to save space in your kitchen cupboards
description: From the brand Tommee Tippee After 60 years of supporting parents around the world, we’ve learned the truth is… everyone’s everyday is different. And that’s okay. ​ Previous page For us, it’s all about making life easier for real mums, dads and caregivers all over the world. ​ ​ At feed time, mealtime, change time and sleep time. We want to make things easier where we can, always listening, creating, and inventing for new parents. ​ ​ It’s no wonder our products are loved by little ones and recommended by generations of parents. ​ See more baby bottles Visit the store See more infant feeding​ Visit the store See more Soothers Visit the store See more Meal Time Visit the store See more sleep Visit the store See more breast-feeding Visit the store See more Change Time Visit the store See more sleeping bags Visit the store See more Care Visit the store Next page
